title: Re-peg stale router-count baseline 172->252 (unparks CI-RED-018)
intent: Update router-count ratchet baseline to reflect 3 months of merged feature work (last pegged 2026-03-14). Restores gate enforcement going forward.

diff_articulation.what_changed: router_count_baseline.json: 172->252 files, 740->1188 decorators. Growth reflects 3 months of merged work across cam (26 files), instrument_geometry (13 files), export (5 files), ai (4 files), and incremental additions to existing directories. _experimental routers (3 files) graduated to proper locations (cam_core via a24cc63d, analytics via 5f00bb2b).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Baseline was 3 months stale (2026-03-14). All 252 files exist on merged main — every counted file is reviewed-and-landed work. Gate was failing on accumulated growth, not proliferation.

commands_run: grep @router showing 229 decorators in routers/cam (33 files), 63 in routers/instrument_geometry (13 files)

files.intent: Fix Python dependency install order and add route witness diagnostics in routing-truth CI workflow
files.behavior_change: ci - routing-truth job setup and diagnostics updated
verification: CBSP21 gate includes workflow file in manifest coverage

files.intent: Re-peg baseline to current router count after 3 months of feature work
files.behavior_change: ci - accepts current router count as baseline, restores ratchet enforcement
verification: Growth is real routes not stubs (verified via @router grep)
